hooks.command: echo '{"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "PreToolUse", "additionalContext": "REMINDER: Before pushing, verify the previous PR is still open via mcp__github__pull_request_read. If it has been merged, reset the branch to origin/main first, then cherry-pick your changes, and open a new PR. Do NOT push follow-up commits to a branch whose PR has already been merged."}}'
